sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46243" key="*zhno/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ζηνόφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Ζήν, φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n46243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">knowing the mind of Zeus</tr_>, epith. of Apollo as revealing Zeus' will in oracles, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
